summary: Rule chunk from The World of Paranoia page 38, chunk 2.

mechanics.raw_text: In emergencies ahi ‘Troubleshooter or other powerful citizen may ‘order Troubleshooter teams on his own authority when communications with The ‘Computer have been compromised. ‘The missions assigned to Troubleshooters are imariably difficult and dangerous. This means that player characters have many opportunities to distinguish themselves in the service of The ‘Computer. If they survive, they may expect to ‘advance in status more rapidly than the laborers, technicians, bureaucrats, and ‘managers of the regular service groups. 38
